title: stelis pachoi
intro: Stelis pachoi, also known as the orchid stelis or pachoi orchid, is a type of orchid species native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis pachoi include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of various conditions. Stelis pachoi is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues or as a natural remedy for promoting overall well-being.
